name: LIBERTY STAR URANIUM & METALS CORP.
business: Liberty Star Uranium & Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration company engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Arizona, focusing on potential deposits of copper, molybdenum, gold, silver, lead, zinc, manganese, and rare earth elements. The company is in the exploration stage, has not generated any revenues, and has not identified any ore reserves.

exposures.sentence: We plan to ascertain whether the Hay Mountain claims possess commercially viable deposits of copper, molybdenum, gold, silver, lead, zinc, manganese, and other metals including Rare Earth Elements (REE s).
